violations.fix_hint: Correct `cac:Delivery/cbc:ActualDeliveryDate` so that an invoice should state the delivery/service date via BT-72 (Actual delivery date), BG-14 (Invoicing period) or a BG-26 (Invoice line period) on EVERY line.
violations.message: The invoice should state the delivery/service date: BT-72 'Actual delivery date', BG-14 'Invoicing period', or BG-26 'Invoice line period' on every line.
violations.title: An invoice should state the delivery/service date via BT-72 (Actual delivery date), BG-14 (Invoicing period) or a BG-26 (Invoice line period) on EVERY line.
